video.title: Giro d'Italia 2020 - Stage 14 Highlights | Cycling | Eurosport

transcript.clean_text: the prosecco hills of northeast italy was the venue for the now annual wine trial at the chilo d'italia a time trial lasting 34.1 kilometers with a difficult moto di cadel poggio coming early on a similar route to a time child we'd had five years ago that was a lot longer starting in treviso would then see the riders finish in valdobiadeni three-time checks along the way rowan dennis was the first rider to really look like he was going supersonic no win on the road since his time trial victory at the world championships in harrogate finally looking back to his best that meant that cherny who had lead said goodbye to the hot seat but there was internal competition at the ineos grenadiers looking for their fourth stage win of this particular gerald italia two of them had gone to super people ghana world champion in the time trial and philippe ganna will do it again 17 seconds at the final chime check quicker than rowan dennis he would take that above 20 mcnulty set off fantastically well only six seconds slower at the first time check than philippe organa the 22 year old from the united states started the day in 11th place his ride at only one minute and nine from the stage winner would take him into the top four from 11th in gc chihuahua almeida in the malls are looking for day 12 in charge of the duo vincenzo nibili didn't start great went really well in the middle and tailed off a bit to the end a strange day for him he'd gain a place but lose time and wilco kelderman re-found his best form in the time trial no victory in the discipline for five years with pale bilbao holding his place in third calderman would keep that form towards the end he'd stay second but would lose a little bit of time on the mayarosa still within a minute though going into the mountains talking in the malaya joao almeida's performance is absolutely astounding adding time in the bonuses on stage 13 he take a little bit of time in the time trial here having a lead of just under a minute 56 seconds in fact as they're ready to hit the mountains sixth place on the day and another superb performance by the young portuguese remember on grand tour debut ghana winning the stage by 26 seconds a fourth foreigners a hat trick for the italian grand tour debut a world champion looking every bit like the man who should wear the rainbow jersey and the majadoza fitting more snugly as the day goes by on the shoulders of the 22 year old portuguese joao almeida so the new gc picture is like this with almeida at 56 seconds of a lead from wilco kelderman bilbao in third but at 211 now mcnulty nibali the top five mike potsov comrade and henley in the top ten full sang dropped from the top ten gagan heart riding really well and he's now right at the gates from getting into those best 10 riders so to their next stage the final stage of the second week it's stage 15 a four out of five star stage four big kom's a big final climb up to pian cavallo for the first time since tom dumoulin won the giro d'italia and it is 185 kilometers to finish week two after a very very big day in the saddle you
